---
title: Resources
---

## Pronoun Guide

[Pronoun Guide](https://lgbthealth.org.uk/pronouns-guide/)

## Fun links

[How to customise your R welcome message with the pride flag](https://rainbowr.org/posts/2024-06-15_rstartup/#a-colour-bar-because-we-can)

[How to create a pride flag in your terminal prompt](https://github.com/kgscialdone/prideprompt)
